# zabbix_media_type_sms (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix SMS media type (notification channel via GSM modem). The `max_sessions` field is not configurable for SMS — Zabbix enforces a value of `1`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zabbix_media_type_sms" "alerts" {
  name      = "SMS alerts"
  gsm_modem = "/dev/ttyS0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `gsm_modem` (String) Serial device path of the GSM modem (e.g. `/dev/ttyS0`).
- `name` (String) Display name of the media type. Must be unique within Zabbix.

### Optional

- `attempt_interval` (String) Interval between delivery attempts (e.g. `10s`, `1m`). Defaults to `10s`.
- `description` (String) Description of the media type.
- `max_attempts` (Number) Maximum number of delivery attempts (1–10). Defaults to `3`.
- `message_templates` (Attributes List) Per-event-source notification templates. If unset, Zabbix defaults are used. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--message_templates))
- `status` (String) Whether the media type is active. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `enabled`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the media type.

<a id="nestedatt--message_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `message_templates`

Required:

- `event_source` (String) Event source. One of: `trigger`, `discovery`, `autoregistration`, `internal`, `service`.
- `message` (String) Message body.
- `recovery` (String) Recovery mode. One of: `operation`, `recovery`, `update`.
- `subject` (String) Message subject.
